1 The approved program in Spanish and Secondary Education requires 2 upper-level courses in literature and culture along with the three linguistics courses this option provides.

Track 3: Spanish Language, Culture, and Professional Contexts

This option combines courses in professional areas to provide a better understanding of professional language environments: three upper-level

courses from the language, culture, and professional contexts area and two classes from the offerings in language, culture, and media.
